landing.lead: Track daily spending, set monthly budgets, and see trends in one dashboard—so you can decide faster and stress less.
landing.aboutDeck: A focused tool for logging expenses, respecting monthly limits, and spotting patterns—without spreadsheet fatigue.
landing.aboutP1: Organize spending by category, compare against your budget share, and keep notes when you need context later.
landing.aboutP2: Whether you are tightening up or just curious, the workflow stays lightweight so the habit actually sticks.
landing.pill1Desc: Set a monthly cap and see headroom at a glance.
landing.pill2Desc: Tag expenses and review charts when you want depth.
landing.pill3Desc: Sign in securely; your ledger stays tied to you.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay on track
landing.featuresDeck: Thoughtful defaults and a clean UI so you spend less time in the app and more time making decisions.
landing.feat1Desc: Totals, category mix, and budget vs spent—presented so the story of the month is obvious in seconds.
landing.feat2Desc: Authentication-backed access and solid engineering practices so your records stay private and available when you need them.
landing.feat3Desc: Add entries quickly, paginate through history, and filter without waiting—optimized for real routines, not demos.
landing.howDeck: Four short steps from signup to better awareness—no training manual required.
landing.step1Desc: Register in a minute and land on your personal workspace.
landing.step2Desc: Log amounts, categories, and optional notes as you go.
landing.step3Desc: Use summaries and charts to see habits, not just totals.
landing.step4Desc: Adjust your budget and behavior with evidence, not guesswork.

auth.passwordMismatch: Password and confirm password must match
auth.forgotLead: Verify your email with OTP, then choose a new password.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account details in one place.
profile.name: Name

user.subtitle: Your recorded expenses on this page.
user.inactiveHint: You are not an active user — you cannot add expenses.
user.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

admin.sectionExpensesSubtitle: Monitor allocated budgets, spend, and every entry in one place.
admin.sectionBudgetsSubtitle: Create, update and track category-wise budgets.
admin.sectionEmployeesSubtitle: Search, sort, and manage active status for your team.
admin.sectionCategoriesSubtitle: View, rename, or remove expense categories from the API.
admin.sectionNotificationsSubtitle: Server-driven inbox from GET /api/admin/notifications (Bearer admin JWT).
admin.notificationsSummarySub: List: GET /api/admin/notifications with optional query params (e.g. limit, offset, is_read, user_id). The badge uses unread items (is_read=false).
admin.notificationsMarkReadFailed: Notifications loaded but could not mark them as read.
admin.notificationsEmptyHint: When the backend creates admin notifications, they will appear here. Use Refresh to reload from the API.
admin.notifBodyBudgetUsage: Overall consumption is about {{pct}}% of allocated budget. Consider reviewing budgets and spend.
admin.notifBodyOverBudget: Remaining headroom is below zero by about {{amount}}. Adjust budgets or spending where needed.
admin.notifBodyCategoryOver: {{n}} budget row(s) have spend above their allocated limit.
admin.notifBodyInactiveUsers: {{n}} user account(s) are marked inactive. You can re-activate them from Employees.
admin.notifBodyArchivedCategories: {{n}} categories are archived (soft-deleted) and hidden from pickers.
admin.sectionRequestsSubtitle: Inactive users who asked to have their account activated again.
admin.requestsWorkspaceHint: List: GET /api/admin/activation-requests. Accept: POST /api/admin/activation-requests/:id/approve. Deny: POST /api/admin/activation-requests/:id/deny.
admin.requestsEmptyHint: When an inactive user submits an activation request, it will show up here.
admin.chartCaption: Outer ring: expense (spent) vs remaining budget. Inner ring: spend by category (from budget overview, or from the current expense page if budgets are unavailable). Centre shows share of allocated budget used.
admin.budgetGaugeIntro: For each category the column height is 100% = that row's budget (allocate). From the bottom yellow fills only the spent ÷ budget share — as much expense, that much yellow. The rest is sky = unused. If spend > budget the top cap line shows the 100% budget limit. Axis is 0–100% allocation; ₹ in labels / tooltip below.
admin.budgetGaugeEmpty: No budget rows to chart yet. Load succeeds when budget details are available.
admin.budgetListHint: Same rows as the budget table. Each bar uses its own budget as 100% height; yellow = spent share of that budget.
admin.budgetMetricTotalSub: Allocated across the org (same as Expenses)
admin.employeeMetricsAria: Employee counts from loaded user list
admin.employeesMetaHint: Paged list from GET /api/admin/users-details with server search, sort, active/inactive filter, and pagination. Toggle status still calls PATCH /api/admin/toggle/:id.
admin.usersMetaHint: Columns from GET /api/admin/users-details (embedded metadata). Prefer this over /api/meta/tables/users for this screen.
admin.searchEmployeesPlaceholder: Search by name, mobile or email…
admin.searchEmployeesAria: Search employees by name, mobile number, or email
admin.employeeStatusChipsAria: Filter employee list by active or inactive
admin.employeeListLoadFailed: Employee list could not be loaded.
admin.employeeListNoColumns: Users API returned no column metadata — cannot build the table.
admin.employeeToggleMissingId: Could not read employee id for this row.
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
admin.addBudgetSubtitle: New category and how much to allocate for the month you pick.
admin.updateBudgetSubtitle: Change category name, period, or allocated amount for this row.
admin.deleteBudgetConfirm: Remove this budget row for {{cat}} ({{month}} / {{year}})? This cannot be undone.
admin.aiChipBudgets: What does budget vs spent mean?
admin.aiChipSearch: How do I search expenses by user?
admin.categoriesMetricTotalSub: Rows returned on GET /api/category (including inactive or archived if sent)
admin.categoriesWorkspaceHint: Name / description: POST /api/category/:id. Remove from active use (soft archive): DELETE /api/category/:id. New category + budget period: Budgets → Add budget.
admin.categoriesEmpty: No categories returned from the server.
admin.categoryEditSubtitle: Update the display name and description (POST /api/category/:id).
admin.deleteCategoryConfirm: Archive category "{{name}}"? It will be soft-deleted (hidden from pickers); existing expense rows keep their history.

table.noReceiptUploaded: No receipt was uploaded for this expense.
table.expenseDetailsEmpty: No details available for this expense.
table.expenseNotesEmpty: No notes added for this expense.

expenseForm.receiptHint: Image: AI scan (server) fills the form; same file uploads on save. PDF: attach on save only.
expenseForm.scanPrefillPartial: Receipt kept — no fields were auto-filled. Fill the form or try scan again.
expenseForm.replaceHint: — scan a new image to replace on save.
expenseForm.title: Title
